videos.title: Jive | Zubenko Ilya & Vysloukh Veronika | 1/2 Russian Championship Youth Latin 2020
videos.description:
Russian Championship Youth Latin 2020
Moscow, Irina Viner-Usmanova Gymnastics Palace
Organizer - FDSARR - https://fdsarr.ru
05.09.2020

FINAL

1. Pugachev German - Tishova Ariadna
2. Kiselev Yaroslav - Filipchuk Sofia
3. Sukmanov Yaroslav - Slavogorodskaya Elizaveta
4. Boriskin Danila - Kulakova Polina
5. Zubenko Ilya - Vysloukh Veronika
6. Malgin Lev - Slinkova Polina

SEMIFINAL

7. Sokolov Andrey - Bortnikova Arina
8. Matronitsky Denis - Simonova Elizaveta
9. Avdeev Mikhail - Naumova Olga
10. Saushev Sergey - Achapkina Svetlana
11. Zhuravlev Danila - Titkova Daria
12. Filatov Alexander - Marty Maryana
